entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A biotic constraint on pigeonpea caused by Pigeonpea sterility mosaic virus.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L) Millsp., a crop affected by Sterility Mosaic Disease.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA STERILITY MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: The causal agent of Sterility Mosaic Disease in pigeonpea.

entities.name: ERIOPHYID MITE
entities.description: A vector transmitting Sterility Mosaic Disease in pigeonpea.

entities.name: ICP 7035
entities.description: A resistant parent line used in QTL mapping for Sterility Mosaic Disease resistance.

entities.name: TTB 7
entities.description: A susceptible parent line used in QTL mapping for Sterility Mosaic Disease resistance.

entities.name: F2:3 MAPPING POPULATION
entities.description: A population developed from resistant and susceptible parents for QTL mapping.

entities.name: EST SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Markers developed using Expressed Sequence Tags and Simple Sequence Repeats for genetic analysis.

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A genetic map showing the relative positions of markers.

entities.name: QTLS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci identified for Sterility Mosaic Disease resistance.

entities.name: SMD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea to withstand Sterility Mosaic Disease.

entities.name: F1S
entities.description: First filial generation resulting from a cross between susceptible and resistant parents.

entities.name: ESTS
entities.description: Expressed Sequence Tags generated from SMD challenged genotypes.

entities.name: UNIGENES
entities.description: Unique genes identified from the assembled ESTs.

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers screened for polymorphism.

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUPS
entities.description: Groups of genes that tend to be inherited together.

entities.name: BENGALURU ISOLATE
entities.description: A specific strain of Pigeonpea sterility mosaic virus from Bengaluru.

entities.name: PATANCHERU ISOLATE
entities.description: A specific strain of Pigeonpea sterility mosaic virus from Patancheru.

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: The geographical region where Sterility Mosaic Disease is a significant constraint on pigeonpea.
